name: pagestrip-custom-tracking-template
description: A small TypeScript framework for integrating custom analytics tracking into pagestrip-powered content.

scripts.build: test -f tracker.ts || (echo 'Missing tracker.ts. Copy tracker.example.ts to tracker.ts before building.' && exit 1); esbuild tracker.ts --bundle --tree-shaking=true --minify --mangle-props='^_[^_]' --format=iife --platform=browser --target=es2015 --outfile=dist/tracker.js && tsc --noEmit

author: pagestrip
